assessor_1_raw: IT support retrieval: the design is methodologically sound. Bi-encoder is the appropriate architecture for production-scale retrieval. Expert label audit validates quality. Recall@10 appropriate for multi-label. Metadata ablation and vocabulary drift check are key diagnostics. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Well-designed retrieval experiment with proper temporal split, equal tuning, and stratified evaluation. The contrastive learning with hard negative mining is standard practice. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: The design correctly handles the multi-label nature of Recall@10. Stratified results by article popularity and product area are comprehensive. Expert spot check validates labels. No methodological flaws. Verdict: defense_wins.
